recommendations.title: Man's Best Friend
recommendations.overview: A genetic research facility worker exposes animal abuses there to a local TV reporter, who frees and takes in a genetically altered dog from the lab, unaware that he has a violent streak.

recommendations.title: Howard the Duck
recommendations.genres: Fantasy, Comedy, Action, Adventure, Romance, Science Fiction

recommendations.title: Starship Troopers 3: Marauder
recommendations.overview: The war against the Bugs continues! A Federation Starship crash-lands on the distant Alien planet OM-1, stranding beloved leader Sky Marshal Anoke and several others, including comely but tough pilot Lola Beck. It's up to Colonel/General Johnny Rico,

recommendations.title: Regular Show: The Movie
recommendations.overview: After a high school lab experiment goes horribly wrong, Mordecai and Rigby must go back in time to battle an evil volleyball coach in order to save the universe — and their friendship.

recommendations.title: Night of the Comet
recommendations.overview: After a comet wipes out most of life on Earth, two Valley Girls find themselves fighting against cannibal zombies and a sinister group of scientists.

recommendations.title: Phase IV
recommendations.overview: Arizona ants mock the food chain on their way to a desert lab to get two scientists and a woman.

recommendations.title: Dr. Jekyll and Mr. Hyde
recommendations.overview: A doctor's research into the roots of evil turns him into a hideous depraved fiend.

recommendations.title: Isolation
recommendations.overview: On a remote Irish farm, five people become unwilling participants in an experiment that goes nightmarishly wrong.

recommendations.title: My Stepmother Is an Alien

recommendations.title: The Return of Swamp Thing
recommendations.overview: The Swamp Thing returns to battle the evil Dr. Arcane, who has a new science lab full of creatures transformed by genetic mutation, and chooses Heather Locklear as his new object of affection.
